scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external @json-render/core --external @json-render/react --external @gouvfr/dsfr --external dsfr-renderer-core
scripts.dev: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external @json-render/core --external @json-render/react --external @gouvfr/dsfr --external dsfr-renderer-core --watch
